reference_images.description: Use this image as ground truth for identity, hair, makeup, wardrobe, lighting, background, and color grade.

custom_style_notes: Cinematic editorial portrait with the same lighting and color palette as the reference.

shot_list.label: Vertical Beauty Portrait
